perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a title screen showing a person on a white scooter with a 'Wreck-It Ralph' animation overlay in front of a Costco Wholesale sign. (2) A series of rapid cuts follows, showcasing various products on Costco shelves. Items include Kirin milk tea, Fuji apples, Pampers diapers, Mi Kuai Kuai snacks, jelly jars, Seattle coffee, Japanese biscuits, Ruffles chips, Pierre butter cookies, and bottled tea. (3) The sequence continues with apparel (PUMA), health supplements (Weider), candy (Chupa Chups), almond tofu, GUM toothpaste, OxiClean, Downy softener, and Tide pods. (4) The final segment displays fresh and frozen goods: seafood, sausages, ginseng, pastries, almond milk, pet food, cheese, Perrier water, shrimp cakes, Listerine, electric toothbrushes, Mackie's ice cream, KitKat cereal, skincare, and alcoholic beverages.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice introduces the 'Costco Weekly Special Report' over upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music. (2) As the products flash on screen, the same male voice rapidly recites the product name and its discounted price for every single item shown. (3) The background music remains consistent in its high energy, and the speaker's tone is consistently excited and promotional throughout the entire duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text at the start: 'COSTCO 每週特價速報 06/30~07/06 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Weekly Special Report, June 30 - July 6, Remember to follow us). (2) Functional text throughout: Each product shot is overlaid with its brand name, item description, 'Original Price' (原價), 'Discount' (-), and 'Special Price' (特價) in large, colorful font. (3) Functional text at the end: Repeated call to action to follow the account.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire list of products and prices -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator briefly seen in the intro and reflected in some shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing casual clothing, appearing briefly at the start on a scooter.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving, pallet-stacked goods, and refrigerated sections.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly inform Costco members in Taiwan about the current week's discount items and their specific sale prices, encouraging them to visit the store and follow the creator for more updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing information and brand-specific callouts within a retail environment.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-talking price recitation and colorful text overlays with Wreck-It Ralph character usage.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a very specific 'fast-paced shopping guide' template popular on short-video platforms like TikTok or Reels to maximize information density.
